data.title: Trump Tells Aides to Prep for Lengthy Hormuz Blockade, Report Says
data.description: President Donald Trump told his aides to prepare for an extended US Naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, the Wall Street Journal reported, as the US looks to intensify economic pressure on Iran as the war enters its third month.
data.keywords: Iran,Donald John Trump,War,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Wall Street,United Arab Emirates,Economic Sanctions,Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries,Washington,Pakistan,politics
